# Q4 Financial Report

This document summarises the financial performance for Q4 2024.

## Revenue

Total revenue reached $4.2 billion, a 12% increase year-over-year.

The growth was driven by strong performance in the cloud segment, which grew 34% compared to the same period last year.

International markets contributed 38% of total revenue, up from 31% in Q3.

## Operating Expenses

Operating expenses totalled $2.8 billion, representing 67% of revenue.

Research and development spend increased by 18% as the company accelerated its AI infrastructure investments.

## Net Income

Net income for the quarter was $980 million, or $1.42 per diluted share.

This compares to $820 million, or $1.19 per diluted share, in the prior year quarter.

The effective tax rate was 21.3%, consistent with the full-year guidance.

## Outlook

For Q1 2025, the company expects revenue in the range of $4.4 billion to $4.6 billion.

Operating margin is expected to be between 22% and 24%.
